Interface Type.Provider

Enclosing interface:
Type
public static interface Type.Provider
Provides components of an external type definition as they're needed. The methods of this interface act upon a special ClassMaker instance, which isn't fully functional. Calling unneeded methods will have no effect, or they may throw a suitable exception.
See Also:
  • Type.external(String, Type.Provider)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addConstructors(ClassMaker cm)
    Fill out the external type by adding all the constructors and setting their access modifiers.
    void
    addFields(ClassMaker cm)
    Fill out the external type by adding all the fields and setting their access modifiers.
    void
    addMethods(ClassMaker cm)
    Fill out the external type by adding all the methods and setting their access modifiers.
    void
    init(ClassMaker cm)
    Initialize the external type by specifying the type hierarchy and access modifiers.

  • Method Details

    • init

      void init(ClassMaker cm)
      Initialize the external type by specifying the type hierarchy and access modifiers.
      Parameters:
      cm - a special ClassMaker instance which is only suitable for specifying external types

    • addFields

      void addFields(ClassMaker cm)
      Fill out the external type by adding all the fields and setting their access modifiers.
      Parameters:
      cm - a special ClassMaker instance which is only suitable for specifying external types

    • addMethods

      void addMethods(ClassMaker cm)
      Fill out the external type by adding all the methods and setting their access modifiers. Attempting to add any code to the methods will have no effect.
      Parameters:
      cm - a special ClassMaker instance which is only suitable for specifying external types

    • addConstructors

      void addConstructors(ClassMaker cm)
      Fill out the external type by adding all the constructors and setting their access modifiers. Attempting to add any code to the constructors will have no effect.
      Parameters:
      cm - a special ClassMaker instance which is only suitable for specifying external types
